activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
EU origin normalization and additional EU members in invoice

consignor.certificate_value: Electrolux Appliances AB, S:t Göransgatan 143, SE-105 45 , STOCKHOLM, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Electrolux Appliances AB, ST. GORANSGATAN 143, 105 45 STOCKHOLM, Sweden
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Electrolux Appliances AB' from Sweden in the certificate is exactly matched to invoice issuer 'Electrolux Appliances AB' at the same address and country. Land and company name match after normalization and allowed variation. No contradictory information found.

consignee.certificate_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI SANAYI VE TICARET A.S., ALTUNIZADE MAH. INCI CIKMAZI SOK. 3/6, 34662 USKUDAR, ISTANBUL, Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: ELECTROLUX DAYANIKLI TUKETIM MAMULLERI VE TICARET A.S., Altunizade mah. Inci cikmazi sok. 3/6, TR-34662 Uskudar,Istanbul, TÜRKIYE
consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address match exactly between certificate and invoice after normalization. The address and country (Turkey) are consistent. Certificate consignee matches invoice buyer field exactly. Land matches per rule 4.2.3.

goods_description.certificate_value: SPARE PARTS FOR : DOMESTIC APPLIANCES FLOORCARE CONSUMABLES AND ACCESSORIES
goods_description.invoice_value: Numerous detailed line items describing spare parts for domestic appliances, floorcare consumables, and accessories per invoice lines with item numbers and descriptions.
goods_description.motivation: Certificate includes a general goods description combined with an explicit invoice reference (invoice no 60368145 dated 12.03.2026). The invoice contains detailed line items matching the description. Multiple origins in the certificate's field 6 are linked to goods in the invoice by country of origin per product line.

quantity.invoice_value: Delivery note: Net weight 1,486.668 KGM Gross weight 1,774.983 KGM (invoice total weight), General quantity: 2,401 PCE
quantity.motivation: Certificate gross and net weights match invoice delivery note net weight exactly and gross weight within normal tolerance. The quantities and weights correspond to the same delivery date and invoice. The invoice net weight is 1,486.668 KGM matching net weight in certificate without discrepancy. Differences between gross weights are within acceptable margin.

origin.certificate_value: China, Turkey, Poland, Hungary, Germany, Thailand, Italy, Hong Kong, Korea, Sweden, Finland, Mexico, Spain, Slovenia, France
origin.invoice_value: Per invoice line, countries of origin include CN (China), TR (Turkey), PL (Poland), HU (Hungary), DE (Germany), TH (Thailand), IT (Italy), HK (Hong Kong), KR (South Korea), SE (Sweden), FI (Finland), MX (Mexico), ES (Spain), SI (Slovenia), FR (France)
origin.motivation: All origin countries listed in certificate field 6 are explicitly identified in invoice's per-line origins. However, the certificate origin field 3 states 'See field 6' without listing the countries explicitly, which complicates mapping. The invoice origin uses ISO codes and abbreviations exactly matching the certificate countries. EU origin normalization applies. Some origin codes in invoice require manual review for suffix or exact match context.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All control points except origin are matched. Origin verification requires manual review due to complexities in origin listing and invoice annotations.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Avsändare, mottagare, varubeskrivning och kvantitet stämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Ursprungsländerna kräver manuell granskning då certifikatet hänvisar till fält 6 för ursprung och vissa uppgifter i fakturan är kodade och behöver tydlig tolkning.
